framework: Schelling focal point detection + physical observables
design: 两层观测: 物理层(状态)+ 焦点层(转折). History in geopulse.db

history.est: 3+ COORDINATED — IRGC THREATENS COMPLETE HORMUZ CLOSURE
history.note: Day 23→24. 🔴🔴🔴 P0 — IRGC ESCALATION THREAT + ULTIMATUM ACTIVE: (1) ★★★★★ IRGC says Hormuz will be 'COMPLETELY CLOSED' if Trump hits power plants (Guardian/CBS/Independent/CNN Mar 22) — BEYOND current partial blockade + selective transit. This is a NEW escalation threat; (2) ★★★★★ NSA Waltz REINFORCED Trump ultimatum (CNN) — WH policy not just Truth Social rhetoric. Deadline: Mon Mar 23 ~23:44 GMT; (3) CENTCOM Gen. Cooper: 8,000+ targets, 130 vessels destroyed = 'largest elimination of a navy since WWII' (Breitbart/CENTCOM Mar 22); (4) CENTCOM released new strike video — vehicles + aircraft in Iran (NDTV Mar 22); (5) IRGC 70 waves of True Promise 4 to date; (6) Dimona/Arad: 200+ wounded, 8 dead CONFIRMED multi-source; (7) Nuclear retaliation cycle (Natanz→Dimona) still active dynamic; (8) China appointed ME envoy (Ekhbary Mar 22) + China-Iran intel cooperation deepening (Small Wars Journal Mar 20); (9) Reuters Mar 22: oil prices set to rise further Monday on mutual energy infrastructure threats. PATTERN: IRGC escalation from 'selective transit' to 'COMPLETE CLOSURE' if trigger is pulled = war has another rung on the escalation ladder that hasn't been used yet. The 48-hour deadline is the SINGLE MOST BINARY decision point of the war.

Day 24. 🔴🔴🔴 ULTIMATUM D-DAY: (1) ★★★★★ Trump 48hr ultimatum RUNNING — deadline ~Mon Mar 23 23:44 GMT (Tue 07:44 Beijing). NSA Waltz reinforced on CNN = WH policy; (2) ★★★★★ IRGC: Hormuz COMPLETELY CLOSED if power plants hit (Guardian/CBS/CNN/Politico Mar 22-23); (3) ★★★★★ NEW ESCALATION: Iran now threatening DESALINATION PLANTS in Gulf states (Reuters Mar 22) — existential for desert populations; (4) ★★★★ Iran fired missiles at Israel early Mon Mar 23 (JPost: shrapnel from Iranian barrage Mar 23; Politico: missiles streak across sky over central Israel early Mon); (5) ★★★★ IDF spokesperson: war to continue "several more weeks" (ToI Mar 22); IDF chief: fight with Hezbollah "only just begun" (ToI); (6) ★★★ Fresh airstrikes on TEHRAN reported (TimesNow Mar 23 liveblog); (7) ★★★ CENTCOM: 8,000+ targets struck, 130 vessels destroyed = "largest elimination of navy since WWII"; (8) ★★ Araghchi: shipping not passing because of insurance, not Iran (ToI). PATTERN: War in BINARY MODE. Both sides firing while countdown runs. Iran early Monday missile barrage on Israel = demonstrating continued capability. Desalination threat = NEW escalation vector targeting WATER SUPPLY (existential for 60M+ Gulf residents).

history.est: 2-3 coordinated BUT DECLINING VOLUME — 1-2 at a time
history.note: Day 24. 🔴 CENTCOM Adm. Cooper: Iran fire declining — "beginning saw dozens of drones/missiles, now only 1-2 at a time" = QUANTITATIVE DEGRADATION. BUT: (1) IRGC claimed strikes on Prince Sultan Air Base (Saudi) + US Fifth Fleet Bahrain with missiles+drones (CNBC18/TimesNow Mar 23); (2) Israel launched "wide-scale wave" strikes on Tehran infrastructure (IDF/CNN/ABC AU/Moneycontrol Mar 23); (3) CENTCOM destroyed Qom Turbine Engine Production Plant (drone engine factory) on Mar 23 (ANI/ET); (4) CENTCOM Adm. Cooper: campaign "ahead or on plan" (Newsday Mar 23); (5) 8,000+ targets struck, 130 vessels destroyed; (6) Iran fired missiles at Israel overnight (cluster munitions on Petah Tikva, fire in Nir Am); (7) Fars/Mizan published TARGET LIST of Gulf power+desalination+UAE Barakah nuclear plant — INDIRECT THREAT; (8) Death toll: 1,500+ Iran, 1,000+ Lebanon, 15 Israel, 13 US. PATTERN: IRGC attack VOLUME declining (Cooper confirmed) but SCOPE expanding (Saudi air base, US 5th Fleet, Israel cities). Shifting from mass salvos to targeted precision strikes = capability degradation but not collapse.

Day 24 19:33. ★★★★★ REGIME SHIFT: Trump POSTPONED power plant strikes 5 DAYS after 'very good and productive' talks with Iran (Reuters/Guardian/AJE/CNBC ~19:15 CST). CENTCOM Adm. Cooper: fire declining from dozens to 1-2 at a time. BUT: IRGC struck Prince Sultan Air Base + US 5th Fleet; Israel wide-scale wave on Tehran; CENTCOM destroyed Qom drone factory; 8000+ targets, 130 vessels destroyed; Iran missiles at Israel (cluster munitions); Fars published target list of Gulf desalination+Barakah nuclear. US dead: 14. Iran dead: 3230+ (HRANA). PATTERN: Volume declining, scope expanding, Trump pivot = potential inflection. Sources: Reuters/Guardian/AJE/CNBC/CENTCOM/Newsday/ANI/HRANA

Day 24 23:33. CENTCOM Cooper: fire declining from dozens to 1-2 at a time. ISW: 85% Iran SAMs destroyed. IRGC still targeting Prince Sultan AB + US 5th Fleet + Israel cities but VOLUME collapsed. CENTCOM: 8000+ targets, 130 vessels destroyed. IDF wide-scale wave on Tehran + Qom drone factory destroyed. Trump 5-day postponement = energy infrastructure OFF-LIMITS. PATTERN: Quantitative degradation confirmed by CENTCOM. Scope expanding (Saudi/Bahrain/Israel) but mass salvo capability gone. Source: CENTCOM/ISW/BBC/CNBC/Newsday

Day 25 07:29. CENTCOM: 9000+ strikes, 140+ vessels destroyed. Cooper: fire declining to 1-2 at a time. ISW: 85% SAMs destroyed. Khorramabad/Tabriz/Urmia civilian casualties. Trump 5-day pause active. Source: NYT/CENTCOM/AJE

Day 25 11:33 CST. CENTCOM Cooper: fire declining to 1-2 at a time (confirmed). ISW: 85% SAMs destroyed. CENTCOM video Mar 23: strikes on Arash-2 drone + Shahed-136 + mobile launch platform. 9000+ targets struck, 140+ vessels destroyed. IDF wide-scale wave on Tehran infrastructure. IRGC still firing at Israel (cluster munitions Petah Tikva) + Prince Sultan AB + 5th Fleet, but mass salvo capability GONE. Iran dead: 1500+ (AJE) / 3230+ (HRANA). US dead: 14. PATTERN: Volume collapse confirmed, scope still expanding. Quantitative degradation irreversible. Source: CENTCOM/ISW/AJE/Time/Reuters/HRANA

Day 25 13:29. ★★★★ JERUSALEM STRUCK: Iranian missile hit building in Jerusalem early Tue, search+rescue deployed (AFP/HT). Sirens in Tel Aviv + central Israel. CENTCOM: 9000+ strikes, 140+ vessels. Iran still launching despite degraded capability. Netanyahu: Israel continues strikes on ALL fronts. IDF strikes Tehran continue. Source: AFP/HT/Haaretz/ToI/CNBC

history.est: 1-2 declining, IRGC firing at Tel Aviv/Jerusalem
history.note: Day 25 15:33 CST. CENTCOM: 9000+ strikes, 140+ vessels destroyed. Cooper: fire declining to 1-2 at a time. ISW: 85% SAMs destroyed. BUT: (1) Iranian missile struck JERUSALEM Tue early morning (AFP); (2) Tel Aviv hit — 6 lightly wounded (ToI Mar 24); (3) Missile debris fell in West Bank; (4) Sirens in Tel Aviv + central Israel AGAIN; (5) IDF continues wide-scale wave on Tehran; (6) CENTCOM video: Arash-2 + Shahed-136 + mobile launch destroyed; (7) Iran death toll 1500+ (AJE) / 3230+ (HRANA); US: 14 dead. PATTERN: IRGC volume collapse CONFIRMED but targeting UPGRADED — Jerusalem + Tel Aviv precision strikes = demonstrating residual capability during 5-day talks window. Political signaling not military breakthrough. Source: AFP/ToI/Haaretz/JPost/CENTCOM/ISW/AJE/HRANA

Day 26. CENTCOM: 9000+ targets struck, 140+ vessels destroyed. Cooper: fire declining to 1-2 at a time. ISW: 85% SAMs destroyed. BUT: (1) Iranian missile struck JERUSALEM Tue AM (AFP); (2) Tel Aviv hit - 6 wounded (ToI); (3) CENTCOM video Mar 23: Arash-2 + Shahed-136 destroyed; (4) 82nd Airborne deploying 3000 soldiers (WSJ); (5) US dead: 14 confirmed (AJE/Time); (6) ★★★★★ 15-POINT PEACE PLAN delivered to Iran via Pakistan Army Chief Asim Munir (NYT Mar 24). Trump: 'in negotiations right now'. Iran publicly denies. JD Vance may attend Islamabad talks next week (Guardian). PATTERN: Volume collapse continues. 82nd Airborne deployment = ground escalation option. But 15-point plan + Pakistan mediation = FIRST STRUCTURED EXIT PATH. Source: CENTCOM/NYT/WSJ/CNBC/Guardian/AFP/ToI/AJE

Day 26. ★★★★ IRGC announced COORDINATED OFFENSIVE by IRGC Navy + Army + Hezbollah against Israel + US bases (Wikipedia/AJE). 58 hospitalized in Israel from missile strike. Iran targeted Gulf countries with missiles+drones AGAIN (oil prices rose). BUT CENTCOM: fire still 1-2 at a time, volume collapsed. 9000+ targets struck, 140+ vessels destroyed. US dead: 14 confirmed (13 combat + 1 health) + 6 refueling aircraft crash. AJE: Pakistan shared US ceasefire demands with Iran, awaiting response. 82nd Airborne 1000+ additional soldiers approved by Trump (NBC). PATTERN: IRGC attempting to demonstrate capability via 'coordinated offensive' label but physical volume remains degraded. Scope expanding (Gulf states hit again, 58 hospitalized Israel) but mass salvo era over. Source: AJE/NBC/CBS/Wikipedia/AP

history.est: 1-2 declining, IRGC 'precision-guided' salvos at Israel+Gulf+US bases
history.note: Day 26 Wed. ★★★★ IRAN COUNTERPROPOSAL + CONTINUED STRIKES: (1) IRGC fired 'precision-guided' missiles+drones at Israel + US bases in Kuwait/Jordan/Bahrain Wed AM (Euronews/AP); (2) Drones hit fuel tank at Kuwait International Airport — fireball (Euronews); (3) Shrapnel fell near Amman, Jordan; air raid warnings in Bahrain; (4) IDF continued wide-scale strikes on Tehran infrastructure Wed; (5) 82nd Airborne 2000-3000 deploying (NPR/WSJ confirmed written orders); (6) CENTCOM: 9000+ targets, 140+ vessels; ISW: 85% SAMs destroyed; (7) Iran death toll: 3230+ (HRANA); US: 14 combat + 1 health + 6 crash = 21 total; (8) IRGC volume STILL declining (1-2 at a time) but hitting WIDER targets — Kuwait airport is NEW. PATTERN: Quantitative degradation confirmed but GEOGRAPHIC expansion (Kuwait airport = civilian infrastructure). Source: Euronews/AP/NPR/WSJ/CENTCOM/ISW/HRANA

history.est: <2 mbd (3-4/day — IRGC THREATENS COMPLETE CLOSURE IF POWER PLANTS HIT)
history.note: Day 23→24. (1) ★★★★★ IRGC: Hormuz will be 'COMPLETELY CLOSED' if power plants hit (Guardian/CBS/Independent/CNN) — escalation from current partial blockade to TOTAL closure; (2) NYT Mar 20 remains latest transit data: avg 3-4 vessels/day (vs 130+ pre-crisis, ~97% reduction); (3) Iran selective transit now includes: China, India, Pakistan, Iraq, Malaysia, Japan; (4) 22-country coalition statement active; CENTCOM 'largest elimination of navy since WWII' — 130 vessels destroyed; (5) Japan open to minesweeping (Guardian Mar 22) — first mine-clearing offer; (6) Reuters Mar 22: oil set to rise Monday as US/Iran threaten energy infrastructure. ASSESSMENT: BINARY OUTCOME. If power plants struck: IRGC complete closure = transit drops from 3-4/day to ZERO + selective transit regime revoked. If ultimatum folds: current partial blockade persists. Either way, physical reopening remains weeks to months away. Japan minesweeping offer = first progress on critical gap but no deployment timeline.

history.est: <2 mbd (3-4/day — BINARY: COMPLETE CLOSURE vs CURRENT TRICKLE)
history.note: Day 24. (1) NYT Mar 20 remains latest transit data: avg 3-4 vessels/day (vs 130+ pre-crisis, ~97% reduction); (2) BBC Verify: ~100 ships since Mar 1 (~5/day avg); (3) ★★★★★ BINARY FORK: If power plants struck → IRGC "completely closed" = transit drops from 3-4/day to ZERO + selective transit revoked. If ultimatum folds → current trickle persists; (4) Iran selective transit: China/India/Pakistan/Iraq/Malaysia/Japan (Araghchi: insurance is the barrier, not Iran); (5) Japan open to minesweeping (Guardian Mar 22) — first mine-clearing offer but no deployment; (6) 22-country coalition statement active; (7) CENTCOM: 130 vessels destroyed, Hormuz radar/intel degraded; (8) ~2,000 ships + 20,000 seafarers stranded (IMO/NYT); (9) Mine threat STILL critical gap. ASSESSMENT: Transit in HOLDING PATTERN pending ultimatum resolution. Desalination plant threat adds NEW dimension — even if strait reopens, Gulf states may be non-functional if water infrastructure hit.

Day 24. NYT Mar 20 remains latest data: avg 3-4 vessels/day (vs 130+ pre-crisis, ~97% reduction). BBC Verify: ~100 ships since Mar 1. IRGC: COMPLETE CLOSURE if power plants hit (Guardian/CBS/CNN). Iran selective transit: China/India/Pakistan/Iraq/Malaysia/Japan. CENTCOM destroyed Hormuz radars + Qom drone factory. A-10s + UK bases active. USS Boxer 2+ weeks out. Mine threat still CRITICAL gap. Trump ultimatum deadline: Mon ~23:44 GMT. BINARY: execute → complete closure (0 transits), fold → current trickle persists.

history.est: <2 mbd (3-4 ships/day — 5-DAY WINDOW, COMPLETE CLOSURE PAUSED)
history.note: Day 24 19:33. Trump postponement REMOVES 'complete closure' trigger for 5 days. NYT Mar 20: 3-4 vessels/day (97% reduction). BBC: ~100 ships since Mar 1. Selective transit: CN/IN/PK/IQ/MY/JP. 2000+ ships stranded. Mine threat CRITICAL. USS Boxer 2+ weeks out. Japan offered minesweeping, no deploy. KEY: Power plant strikes paused = IRGC complete closure counter-threat PAUSED. Current trickle persists >=5 days. Sources: NYT/BBC/CNBC/Guardian/Reuters/CENTCOM/IMO

Day 24 23:33. Windward AI Mar 22: only 16 AIS-visible crossings in past 7 days = 2.3/day (DOWN from 3-4). Goldman: flows at 5% of normal. NYT Mar 20: avg 3-4/day. BBC: ~100 ships since Mar 1. CNBC Mar 18: 11 China-linked vessels Mar 1-15. Trump postponement REMOVES complete closure trigger for 5 days. Iran selective transit: CN/IN/PK/IQ/MY/JP. Mine threat CRITICAL. USS Boxer 2+ weeks out. DECLINING TREND: 2.3/day vs 3-4/day earlier = transit deteriorating despite no escalation trigger. Source: Windward/NYT/BBC/CNBC/Goldman/Reuters
Day 25. Windward: 2.3/day. Goldman: 5% normal. Trump pause removes closure trigger 4 more days. Source: Windward/Goldman/NYT

Day 25. NYT Mar 20: 3-4 vessels/day. Windward: 2.3/day (declining). BBC: ~100 ships since Mar 1. CNBC: 11 China-linked Mar 1-15. Trump 5-day pause REMOVES complete closure trigger (4 days remaining, deadline ~Mar 28). Iran selective transit: CN/IN/PK/IQ/MY/JP. Araghchi: insurance barrier not Iran. 2000+ ships stranded. Mine threat CRITICAL gap. Japan offered minesweeping no deploy. PATTERN: Transit in holding pattern. Slight decline (3-4→2.3/day) may reflect insurance tightening not new blockade action. Source: NYT/Windward/BBC/CNBC/Guardian/IMO
Day 25. No new transit data. Trump pause still active (4 days remain). Source: unchanged

Day 25. ABC AU Mar 24: 'zombie ships' with AIS off transiting Hormuz — actual flow may be slightly higher than AIS data shows. Windward: 2.3/day visible. NYT Mar 20: 3-4/day. Trump 5-day pause still active (3 days remaining, deadline ~Mar 28). IRGC safe corridor for CN/IN/PK/IQ/MY/JP. Iran imposing M transit fee (Mathrubhumi). SCMP: China priority is economics not politics in Gulf. Mine threat CRITICAL gap. USS Boxer 2+ weeks out. PATTERN: Transit in holding pattern with slight dark-fleet activity. Insurance barrier + mine threat = physical constraints beyond IRGC intent. Source: ABC AU/Windward/NYT/SCMP/Mathrubhumi

Day 26. (1) ★★★ Iran told IMO 'non-hostile vessels' may transit if they coordinate with Iranian authorities (Reuters Mar 24) — FIRST FORMAL TRANSIT FRAMEWORK; (2) ★★★ Bahrain proposed UNSC resolution authorizing 'all necessary means' to protect Hormuz shipping; France tabled rival text (Reuters Mar 24); (3) Zombie ships with AIS off transiting (ABC AU); (4) Windward: 2.3/day visible, declining; (5) Kalshi: <25% odds of normal transit before Apr 15, 67% by Jun 1; (6) Trump 5-day pause still active (2 days remain, deadline ~Mar 28); (7) CNBC: tanker traffic won't return for months. PATTERN: Iran formalizing transit regime at IMO = institutional path to partial reopening. Bahrain UNSC draft = military enforcement path. Two competing frameworks emerging. Source: Reuters/CNBC/ABC AU/Windward/Kalshi/IMO

history.est: ~1.5 mbd (2-3 ships/day, IMO framework + UNSC drafts)
history.note: Day 26. (1) Iran told IMO 'non-hostile vessels' may transit if they coordinate with Iranian authorities (Reuters Mar 24) — ships with no ties to Israel/US allowed (NYT); (2) Bahrain proposed UNSC resolution 'all necessary means' for Hormuz; France tabled rival text (Reuters); (3) Windward: 2.3/day visible, zombie ships with AIS off also transiting; (4) Brent CRASHED below $100 on ceasefire hopes — $98.28 (-6%) Wed Asian; (5) Kalshi: <25% normal transit before Apr 15, 67% by Jun 1; (6) Trump 5-day pause still active (1 day remaining, deadline ~Mar 28); (7) CNBC: tanker traffic won't return for months. PATTERN: TWO competing transit frameworks emerging — Iran's unilateral IMO regime vs Bahrain's UNSC military enforcement. Oil price crash suggests market pricing in diplomatic resolution despite zero physical change in transit volume. Source: Reuters/NYT/CNBC/Windward/Kalshi

history.est: ~1.5 mbd (2-3 ships/day, IRAN COUNTERPROPOSAL CLAIMS HORMUZ SOVEREIGNTY)
history.note: Day 26 Wed. ★★★★★ IRAN'S 5-CONDITION COUNTERPROPOSAL CLAIMS HORMUZ SOVEREIGNTY: (1) Iran rejected US 15-point plan (AP/NPR/NYT Mar 25); (2) Iran issued OWN counterproposal via Press TV: demands reparations + sovereignty over Strait of Hormuz (NPR); (3) Iran told IMO 'non-hostile vessels' may transit if coordinated with Iran (Reuters Mar 24); (4) CNBC: Brent -3.8% to $100.54, WTI -3.6% to $89.01 on talks hopes despite Iran rejection; (5) Goldman base case: Hormuz normalize in April over 4 weeks; (6) Windward: 2.3/day visible + zombie ships AIS-off; (7) Bahrain UNSC draft 'all necessary means' + France rival text — vote pending; (8) Trump: Iran gave him 'very big present' related to Hormuz. PATTERN: TWO frameworks now THREE — Iran unilateral IMO regime + Bahrain UNSC military + Iran counterproposal claiming sovereignty. Source: AP/NPR/NYT/Reuters/CNBC/Euronews/Goldman

history.est: D+8 — FIRST PHYSICAL BARRELS EXPECTED TODAY
history.note: SPR D+8. 🔴 PHYSICAL DELIVERY DAY: (1) Bloomberg: first US SPR barrels expected to hit market TODAY Mon Mar 23; (2) SPR still 415.4M bbl (EIA thru Mar 13) — ZERO physical drawdown confirmed in data; (3) DOE 45.2M bbl first batch contracts (BP, Gunvor) awarded; (4) OPIS: HALF of 172M bbl will be LOANED not sold; (5) Treasury 30-day sanctions waiver on ~140M bbl Iranian oil ACTIVE; (6) Gas: $3.94/gal national avg (USAToday Mar 22), up 30%+ in some states (NYT Mar 22). $2.98 pre-war. NBC: gas spending up 14% YoY; (7) LAST CLOSE: Brent $112.19 (WAR HIGH), WTI $98.32; (8) Reuters Mar 22: oil set to rise further Monday; (9) Goldman 'triple digits for years'; Citi $120/$150; Saudi $180; (10) JP Morgan cut S&P target to 7,200, downside 6,000. CRITICAL: TODAY is TRIPLE CONVERGENCE: (A) first SPR physical barrels, (B) Trump 48-hour ultimatum running, (C) markets reopen after weekend of nuclear retaliation + ultimatum + IRGC counter-threat. If power plants struck → IRGC complete Hormuz closure → Brent $130-150 → SPR irrelevant. If ultimatum folds → Brent may settle $108-115 on relief. SPR physical delivery at ~1.4 mbd avg is NOISE vs ultimatum binary.

history.est: D+8 — FIRST PHYSICAL BARRELS SHIPPED FRIDAY
history.note: SPR D+8. ★★★ ARGUS MEDIA CONFIRMED: First SPR shipments began FRIDAY Mar 21 (Argus Mar 21). DOE awarded contracts to 8 companies for 45.2M bbl from 3 storage sites (TX+LA). Recipients include Shell, Marathon Petroleum, BP. Deliveries scheduled Apr 1-May 31 with possible early deliveries. EXCHANGE CONTRACTS (loans): companies return 55M bbl (22% more than borrowed) — backwardation makes this work ( Apr vs  2028). Only 45.2M of 86M offered was subscribed (52%). Goldman raised 2026 Brent avg forecast to  (from ), Reuters Mar 23. Brent -112 Monday Asian. WTI ~ (tested ). S&P futures -0.4%. Gold ,609 (-0.7%). Gas .94/gal (+32% from .98 pre-war). CRITICAL: First physical barrels are flowing but at TRICKLE rate — 45.2M bbl over Apr-May = ~0.75 mbd, far below 4.4 mbd max. Structurally insufficient vs  Brent + Gulf production destruction.

fp1_china_action.label: 中国实质行动(唯一可行聚点注入)
fp1_china_action.findings: Day 26 Wed. China still NOT mediator. Pakistan confirmed as primary broker: (1) Two Pakistani officials confirmed Iran received 15-point plan (AP); (2) PM Sharif offered Pakistan/Turkey as venue (Reuters); (3) Senior Iranian official confirmed receipt via Pakistan (Reuters); (4) China envoy Zhai Jun called for no attacks on nonmilitary targets — BOILERPLATE; (5) China actual action = selective transit corridor for Chinese ships (self-interest only); (6) No Chinese naval deployment, no UNSC action, no sanctions-busting. BELOW threshold. Source: AP/Reuters/NBC/SCMP

fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.label: 美方信号包内部矛盾(承诺解锁前导)
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.findings: Day 26 Wed. ★★★★★ PEAK CONTRADICTION + COUNTERPROPOSAL: (1) Iran REJECTED 15-point plan + issued 5-condition counterproposal: reparations + Hormuz sovereignty (NPR/AP/NYT); (2) US+Israel rejected Iran counterproposal (Fox); (3) Trump: 'in negotiations right now', claims Iran gave 'very big present' re Hormuz; (4) BUT SIMULTANEOUSLY: 82nd Airborne 2-3K deploying (NPR); 50K+ US troops already in region; Marines en route; (5) IRGC continued strikes on Israel+Kuwait+Jordan+Bahrain; (6) IDF strikes on Tehran continue; (7) Trump approval CRASHES to 36% (Reuters/Ipsos) — lowest yet, driven by gas prices; (8) Gas ~$3.98/gal (+$1 since war). PATTERN: Both sides now have written proposals on table = STRUCTURED negotiation framework EXISTS. But military escalation ACCELERATING in parallel. 36% approval = domestic cost pressure mounting. Source: NPR/AP/NYT/Fox/Reuters/CNBC/WSJ

fp3_face_saving_framework.label: 面子工程原材料出现
fp3_face_saving_framework.findings: Day 26 Wed. ★★★★★ fp3 UPGRADED — BILATERAL PROPOSAL EXCHANGE: (1) US 15-point plan delivered via Pakistan (confirmed received by Iran — AP/Reuters); (2) Iran REJECTED but issued OWN 5-condition counterproposal (NPR/AP/NYT): demands reparations, Hormuz sovereignty, safeguards against future attacks; (3) US+Israel rejected Iran counterproposal (Fox); (4) Pakistan/Turkey offered as venue (Reuters: senior Iranian official confirmed); (5) Bahrain UNSC 'all necessary means' + France rival text — MULTILATERAL track; (6) Goldman base case: Hormuz normalize in April over 4 weeks. ASSESSMENT: fp3 now at HIGHEST level — both sides have written proposals = Schelling bargaining range established. Probability of ceasefire framework INCREASED: 40-50% within 2 weeks. Key: mutual rejection is NORMAL first step in structured negotiation. The fact that Iran issued counterproposal (not just rejected) = SIGNAL of willingness to negotiate. Source: AP/NPR/NYT/Fox/Reuters/Goldman

fp4_cost_threshold.label: 成本阈值的物理逼近
fp4_cost_threshold.findings: Day 26 Wed. (1) ★★★★ Trump approval CRASHES to 36% — new low (Reuters/Ipsos Mar 25); (2) Gas ~$3.98/gal national (+$1/gal since war = +33%); (3) CAP: war cost $25B+ by end of week 4; Pentagon requesting $25B supplemental; (4) US dead: 21 total (14 combat + 1 health + 6 crash); 200+ wounded; (5) S&P 500: 6,604 (+0.73% Wed, recovering); VIX: ~26-29 elevated; (6) Retail investors net SOLD first time since Nov 2023; (7) IEA: crisis worse than 1970s+Ukraine COMBINED; (8) NYT: high oil+gas prices could OUTLAST war; (9) War Powers S.J.Res.104 FAILED — no Congressional binding constraint. PATTERN: 36% approval is CRITICAL political threshold. War fatigue + gas prices driving diplomacy. Binding economic threshold NOT yet reached (gas <$4.50, casualties <50, S&P >6000) but APPROACHING. Trajectory → threshold within 1-2 weeks if war continues. Source: Reuters/Ipsos/CAP/NYT/CNBC/VandaTrack/IEA

noise_filter.rule: 按行为类型分类,不按人物分类
noise: 巴盖伊等发言人声明(言辞)
媒体'消息人士'报道(未验证)
signal: Trump签署行政令/军事命令(行动)
美军实际调兵/部署变化(行动)
IRGC实际攻击模式变化(行动)
中国实际经济/军事动作(行动)
noise_filter.key_distinction: 同一个人的言辞=噪声,行动=信号。Trump说'just for fun'=噪声。Trump命令打Kharg=信号。

pipeline_daily_checklist: 1. 物理层: 更新Q1(袭击频率) + Q2(通行量) + Q3(SPR释放)
2. 焦点层: 扫描fp1(中国动作) + fp2(美方矛盾) + fp3(退出框架) + fp4(成本阈值)
3. 噪声过滤: 新闻分类为action vs rhetoric
4. 结构性验证: 跑structural_verify检查盲区+停滞+链断裂
5. DAG更新: 只有物理层变化或焦点层信号触发才更新概率
